All **28 tests pass**. Here's what was created:

**`src/Store/ShoppingCart.cs`** — Implemented the class with:
- `AddItem` — validates inputs, accumulates quantity for duplicate SKUs
- `RemoveItem` — throws `KeyNotFoundException` if SKU missing
- `CalculateTotal` — sums (qty × price), applies coupon discount
- `ApplyCoupon` — supports `SAVE10` (10%), `SAVE20` (20%), `HALF` (50%)

**`tests/Store.Tests/ShoppingCartTests.cs`** — 28 MSTest tests covering:

| Area | Tests |
|---|---|
| AddItem | single item, duplicate SKU accumulation, multiple SKUs, null/empty/whitespace SKU, invalid quantity, negative price, zero price |
| RemoveItem | existing item, missing SKU, null/empty SKU |
| CalculateTotal | empty cart, single item, multiple items, after removal |
| ApplyCoupon | all 3 codes, case-insensitivity, unknown code, null/empty, coupon replacement |
| Integration | full add → coupon → total workflow |
